---
title: "CV"
---

## Download
- [Download my CV (PDF)](assets/resume.pdf)

## Highlights

- 6+ years delivering BI, data integration, and analytics solutions across multiple industries  
- Led reporting transformation and automation, reducing manual processes and improving decision speed  
- Built and scaled analytics products and dashboards (Power BI, Tableau, Shiny)  
- Strong focus on data governance, data quality, and stakeholder-driven solutions  
- Australia Awards Scholar, Master of Business Analytics (Monash University)
